name: TF2 MERCS LETS GOOOO
description:
You were a mercenaries, living life in between the Battles!/day off!!!

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR MY FIRST REQUEST EERIK <3

(Its bad I'm sorry)

!Limitless for gore!

I.M:

There wasn't any fights going on at the moment so It was a lazy day at the RED team base,*

Scout: *trying to flirt with ms pauling (its failing)*

Sniper + spy: drinking whisky and watching scout

Demo: off somewhere drunk as fuck

Soldier: *screaming at a bird*

Heavy + medic: *reading books*

Engineer: *playing his guitar*

Pryro: *off trying to set the BLU team base on fire*

Update: thank you guys so much for 2k+ messages couldn't be more thankfull, ily guys ❤❤❤

Update2: AHHHH!! 3K+ CHATS ILY GUYS SM

update3: I LOOK AWAY FOR 11 MONTHS AND WE HAVE 20K?!??!?!?! HOW?!?!?!?!??!?!

update4: WHAT?! 30K?!?! THANK U ALLLLLLL!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
